themes.reasoning_notes: Heroic trigger directly rewards targeting it with your spells by copying the best creature on board.
Cheap evasive-style clone play can swing board texture efficiently, but tempo is secondary to the heroic payoff.
Heroic is explicit in oracle text; it directly rewards targeting your own creature and preserves the ability through copying.
Copying the best creature for low cost can create a temporary efficiency swing, but tempo is only loosely implied, not a core build-around.
